CustomField.description: Toggling this will make the subtask non-billable. If the task is created as billable, all of these automatically created subtasks should inherit from the parent task
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Toggling this will make the subtask non-billable. If the task is created as billable, all of these automatically created subtasks should inherit from the parent task
CustomField.label: Billable (to be deprecated)
